_comment: Agent-facing compensation workflow. Each action is a Directus MANUAL flow triggered via POST /flows/trigger/{id} with body { collection: 'compensation_requests', keys: [<requestId>], ...inputs }. IDs are identical in production and in the local clone (preserved on purpose) so the portal is environment-agnostic — it targets VITE_DIRECTUS_URL. Real execution (incl. the Yiji CreateCoupon call) happens on the Directus the portal points at; local stand-in flows perform only the status transition, no external calls.

actions.label: Acknowledge
actions.effect: status -> In Progress; stamps inprogress_at / inprogress_by

actions.label: Generate coupon
actions.effect: PROD: calls Yiji CreateCoupon, creates Com_Coupons row, links it (coupons) + sets coupon_code

actions.label: Assign coupon
actions.effect: links the generated/selected coupon to the request

actions.label: Reject
actions.effect: status -> Rejected; stamps declined_at / declined_by / decline_reason (terminal)

actions.label: Refund amount
actions.effect: script-driven refund of the compensation amount
